title: Vegetarian Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegetarian tagine made with roasted vegetables and saudi spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped red bell pepper and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and zucchini and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the saudi spices and garlic and stir to combine.
Continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
